mainEntity.name: How much does a Jaguar AJD-V6 engine replacement cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: A reconditioned AJD-V6 typically costs £4,500–£6,000 supply only [JAG-QUOTE], varying by displacement and specific sub-variant. Fitting adds £650–£1,300 depending on labour rates. Use our calculator for a figure specific to your car.

mainEntity.name: Is the Jaguar AJD-V6 a reliable engine?

acceptedAnswer.text: We rate the AJD-V6 at 3 stars out of 5 with 88% confidence, based on 1,680 UK enquiries and cross-referenced specialist reports. It delivers strong performance when maintained, but known issues can be costly if neglected.

mainEntity.name: What is the most common Jaguar AJD-V6 failure?

acceptedAnswer.text: Crankshaft failure and spun bearings are the most devastating faults, with oil pump casting cracks causing sudden pressure loss. Timing belt replacement is critical at 105,000–110,000 miles.

mainEntity.name: Which Jaguar models use the AJD-V6?

acceptedAnswer.text: The AJD-V6 powers the S-Type (2.7D), XF (2.7D/3.0D), XJ (2.7D/3.0D), and F-Pace (3.0D) — covering over a decade of Jaguar diesel production across six model generations.

mainEntity.name: Is the Jaguar AJD-V6 the same as Land Rover’s version?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes — the AJD-V6 is the same base engine as Land Rover’s 276DT (2.7 TDV6) and 306DT (3.0 SDV6). The core block, crankshaft, and oil pump design are identical; only ECU mapping and some peripherals differ.

hero.h1: Jaguar AJD-V6 Diesel Engine — Specs, Reliability & Replacement Cost
hero.subHeadline: The Jaguar AJD-V6 is a 2.7/3.0 V6 turbodiesel — a strong torque monster, but crankshaft and oil pump failures are well-documented. Backed by 1,680+ real UK enquiries in 2025 [JAG-VERIFIED].

rows.metric: Confidence: 88% confidence — based on 1,680 UK enquiries and cross-referenced specialist rebuild reports.
Midpoint of Reconditioned range (£5,250) falls in £5,000–£6,999 bracket → 12

rows.value: Mixed failures — some cheap fixes (inlet manifolds, EGR), but crankshaft and oil pump failures are often catastrophic, full-replacement events

rows.metric: Well-supported; parts available through multiple UK suppliers and specialist networks

rows.value: Recon cost (£4,500–£6,000) as % of lowest Jaguar host value (~£8,000) = 45–59% bracket → 12

One-line verdict: The AJD-V6 delivers effortless torque and refinement — but crankshaft failure and oil pump weakness can write off the engine — buy only with full service history and documented oil pump revisions.

rows.metric: Best for: high-mileage motorway drivers who maintain strict oil change intervals.
rows.value: Avoid if: no documented oil pump revision or timing belt history above 80,000 miles.

compatibility.crossBrandNote: Also powers the Land Rover Discovery 3/4, Range Rover Sport, and Range Rover L405 → [link to Land Rover 276DT/306DT pages].

costGuide.labourEstimate: Fitting an AJD-V6 typically takes 12–16 hours at £65–£95/hr (independent) or £110–£160/hr (London/SE dealer) [JAG-QUOTE].
costGuide.sharedCostNote: Parts cost is identical across Jaguar and Land Rover applications; labour time varies slightly by engine bay access.
